name: MSDS Chain — Chemical Safety Intelligence
description: MCP server providing chemical safety reasoning tools for AI-assisted experiment design. Compatibility checks, hazard analysis, PPE, storage, waste disposal, mixing order, regulatory compliance, and signed audit reports.

plugins.name: msds-chain
plugins.description: 18 chemical safety tools — compatibility, risk warnings, PPE, storage, waste disposal, mixing order, alternatives, exposure limits, transport classification, regulatory compliance, protocol validation, SDS sections, batch audit, and signed reports. Supports 5 languages and 8 regulatory jurisdictions.
plugins.author: LAgentBot
